zh.lifeSummary: 當George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness於1382年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskine32歲，母親Catherine Cairns28歲。他於大約1428年與Euphremia Douglas在蘇格蘭凱特內斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1452年被列為keeper of stirling castle。他去世於1454年8月1日在英國蘇格蘭韋斯特 洛迪安林利斯格福享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness于1382年出生在英国苏格兰艾丁波时，他的父亲Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskine32岁，母亲Catherine Cairns28岁。他于大约1428年与Euphremia Douglas在苏格兰凱特內斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1452年被列为keeper of stirling castle。他去世于1454年8月1日在英国苏格兰韋斯特 洛迪安林利斯格福享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness was born in 1382, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskine, was 32 and his mother, Catherine Cairns, was 28. He married Euphremia Douglas about 1428, in Caithness, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1452, at the age of 70, his occupation is listed as keeper of stirling castle. He died on 1 August 1454, in Linlithgow, West Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness est né en 1382, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskine, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Catherine Cairns, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Euphremia Douglas environ 1428, à Caithness, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1452, à l’âge de 70 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est keeper of stirling castle. Il est décédé le 1 août 1454, à Linlithgow, West Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.Linlithgow, West Lothian, , Scotland, Un: Linlithgow, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness 1382 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskine 32 und seine Mutter Catherine Cairns 28. Er hat um 1428 in Caithness, Scotland Euphremia Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1452, als er 70 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als keeper of stirling castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. August 1454 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Linlithgow, West Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Euphremia Douglas circa 1428, nel Caithness, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1452, all'età di 70 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come keeper of stirling castle. Morì il 1 agosto 1454, nel Linlithgow, West Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithnessが1382年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskineは32歳，母Catherine Cairnsは28歳であった。約1428年にスコットランドケイスネスでEuphremia Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1452年，70歳の時，職業はkeeper of stirling castleと記録されている。彼は1454年8月1日にイギリススコットランドウエスト ロスアンリンリスゴウで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness(이)가 1382년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskine(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Cairns(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1428년 스컷랜드 케이스네스에서 Euphremia Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1452년, 70세의 나이로 그의 직업은 keeper of stirling castle이었다. 그는 1454년 8월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 웨스트 로스이언 린리스고에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness nasceu em 1382, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskine, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Cairns, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphremia Douglas aproximadamente 1428, em Caithness, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Crichton of Cairns - Earl of Caithness родился в 1382 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen Crichton of Cairns - Sheriff of Linlithgow, Lord Erskine было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Cairns, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphremia Douglas около 1428 г. в местности цеитнесс, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1452 году, в возрасте 70 лет,  он работал по профессии keeper of stirling castle. Он умер 1 августа 1454 г. в местности линьлитгоу, вест лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
